Kimi: Image 1 is the only clear, recognizable trumpet with correct structure (mouthpiece, valves, bell) and no AI artifacts. Image 4 depicts deconstructed trumpet parts that remain identifiable. Image 2 fails object correctness entirely, showing a fire-hydrant-like mechanical object instead of any musical instrument. Image 3 is worst as it depicts a French horn (wrong instrument entirely) and contains heavy AI artifacts with prominent gibberish text.

Kimi: Image 3 displays perfect dromedary anatomy with correct proportions, realistic texture, and no AI artifacts. Image 4 is a clean stylized illustration of a Bactrian camel with all 4 legs and proper silhouette. Image 2 has a severely deformed shelf-like hump that defies camel anatomy and odd neck proportions. Image 1 critically fails by depicting only 2 legs instead of 4, violating basic structural correctness.

Kimi: Image 1 is the only structurally correct trumpet with proper proportions, three valves, and no AI artifacts. Image 3 depicts a stylized/pocket trumpet with unusual proportions but remains a single coherent instrument. Image 2 fails completely as it depicts a vertically oriented tuba-like instrument with a spherical bottom that is not a trumpet.
